LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall.label: Phantom Wall
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall.description: A building that employs phase space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_.label: Phantom Wall (Home)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_.description: A building that employs phase space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.\n\nPrevents enemies, visitors, and prisoners.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Power.label: Phantom Wall (Home) (With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Power.description:
A building that employs phase space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Prevents enemies, visitors, and prisoners.

With integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_PowerLight.label: Phantom Wall (Home) (Self-Luminous With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_PowerLight.description:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops enemies, visitors, prisoners.

Self-illuminating with integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_.label: Phantom Wall (Outdoor)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_.description: A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_Power.label: Phantom Wall (Outdoor) (With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_Power.description:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops enemies, visitors, prisoners.

With integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_PowerLight.label: Phantom Wall (Outdoor) (Self-Luminous With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_all_PowerLight.descripti:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops enemies, visitors, prisoners.

Self-illuminating with integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Animal_.label: Phantom Wall (Animal Pen)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Animal_.description: A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies. \n\nStops domestic animals. Stops all objects except colonists.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Animal_Power.label: Phantom Wall (Animal Pen) (With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Animal_Power.description:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops domestic animals. Stops all objects except colonists.

With integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Animal_PowerLight.label: Phantom Wall (Animal Pen) (Self-Luminous With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Animal_PowerLight.descri:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops domestic animals. Stops all objects except colonists.

Self-illuminating with integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Prisoners_.label: Phantom Wall (Prison)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Prisoners_.description: A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.\n\nStops domestic animals and prisoners. Stops all objects except colonists.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Prisoners_Power.label: Phantom Wall (Prison) (With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Prisoners_Power.descript:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops domestic animals and prisoners. Stops all objects except colonists.

With integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_Prisoners_PowerLight.des:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops domestic animals and prisoners. Stops all objects except colonists.

Self-illuminating with integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_AnomalyEntity_.label: Phantom Wall (Entity Cell)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_AnomalyEntity_.descripti: A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.\n\nStops domestic animals, prisoners and all anomaly entities. Stops all objects except colonists.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_AnomalyEntity_Power.desc:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops domestic animals, prisoners and all anomaly entities. Stops all objects except colonists.

With integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall_AnomalyEntity_PowerLight:
A building that employs phase-space folding technology. It is imperceptible to authorized personnel, yet an absolutely impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Stops domestic animals, prisoners and all anomaly entities. Stops all objects except colonists.

Self-illuminating with integrated cables.
